news.headline: The Soldier Who Came Back From the Dead
news.summary: Told that Nazar Daletskyi had died, his Ukrainian family buried what they thought were his remains. He turned up three years later in a prisoner-of-war exchange.

news.headline: Iran war prompts global energy rethink that favours China
news.summary:
Oil prices surged about 10 per cent and Chinese stocks fell on Thursday as widening conflict in the Middle East created new concerns about global energy supplies.
